fields.name: Time Sheet No.
fields.tooltip: Displays the number of an archived time sheet.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: Displays the number of the line for an archived time sheet.

fields.name: Time Sheet Starting Date
fields.tooltip:
Displays the start date for an archived time sheet.

You cannot change the contents of this field.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of time sheet line.

fields.name: Job No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number for the project that is associated with the time sheet line.

fields.name: Job Task No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related project task.

fields.name: Cause of Absence Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the codes that you can use to describe the type of absence from work.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the archived time sheet line.

fields.name: Work Type Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies which work type the resource applies to. Prices are updated based on this entry.

fields.name: Approver ID
fields.tooltip:
Displays the Approver ID. This information comes from the Time Sheet Approver User ID setting specified in the resource card. The list of available IDs is set by the list of users with time sheet administrator permissions in the User Setup window.

You cannot change the contents of this field.

fields.name: Service Order No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the service order number that is associated with an archived time sheet line.

You cannot change the contents of this field.

fields.name: Total Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total number of hours that have been entered on a time sheet.

fields.name: Chargeable
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the time associated with an archived time sheet is chargeable.

fields.name: Assembly Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the assembly order number that is associated with the time sheet line.

fields.name: Assembly Order Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the assembly order number line that is associated with the time sheet line.

You cannot change the contents of this field.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies information about the status of an archived time sheet.

fields.name: Approved By
fields.tooltip:
Displays the ID for the approver of the time sheet. The default ID is the approver specified on the resource card. You can update this ID in the archived version of the time sheet.

You cannot change the contents of this field.

fields.name: Approval Date
fields.tooltip:
Displays the date that an archived time sheet line was approved.

You cannot change the contents of this field.

fields.name: Posted
fields.tooltip: Stores information about whether an archived time sheet line has been posted.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies that a comment about this document has been entered.
